reasoning: The crowd forecast on Oct 16, 2025 was 30%. Given the knowledge cutoff of Oct 26, 2025, there are only about two months remaining in the year for a new regulation to both be announced and take effect by December 31, 2025. BIS recently implemented a massive export control package concerning AI chips and model weights in January 2025, which required compliance by May 2025. The cadence of major BIS actions on AI chips has typically been annual or longer (Oct 2022, Oct 2023, Jan 2025), so another major package in late 2025 is less likely, further underscored by the crowd's 30% estimate. The small passage of time without an announcement since Oct 16 leads me to slightly decrease the probability from the 30% market estimate to 28%.
